meaning: adj.易处理的,易管理的,便于管理的
examples: He plans to test this more manageable system on live thunderclouds next summer.
The small, manageable size of Bishop's body of work has facilitated its extraordinary critical reception since her death.
The debt has been reduced to a more manageable level.
It offers a good return on investment, consistent profitability, manageable leverage, and good starting valuation.
Reformulating large problems as small problems in a flawed system makes action appear manageable.
